subject: english
description: 形容詞は名詞を修飾したり、状態を表す語です。

questions.question: I read a ___ book. (new)
questions.explanation: 名詞の前には形容詞を置きます

questions.question: The game is ___. (fun)
questions.explanation: be動詞の後には形容詞を置きます

questions.question: She has ___ hair. (long)
questions.explanation: 名詞の前には形容詞を置きます

questions.question: The book is ___. (interesting)
questions.explanation: be動詞の後には形容詞を置きます

questions.question: He is a ___ boy. (tall)
questions.explanation: 名詞の前には形容詞を置きます

questions.question: This is a ___ car. (fast)
questions.explanation: 名詞の前には形容詞を置きます

questions.question: The weather is ___. (beautiful)
questions.explanation: be動詞の後には形容詞を置きます

questions.question: She is a ___ student. (smart)
questions.explanation: 名詞の前には形容詞を置きます
